query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `document_hard_copy` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `odooOrderId` int NOT NULL, `orderType` enum('purchase','sales') NOT NULL, `documentField` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `received` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `receivedBy` varchar(128), `receivedAt` timestamp NULL, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `document_hard_copy_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`));
